desc: Performs a pairwise bounding-box clash pass across every visible element in Autodesk.Revit.DB.Document.ActiveView, then appends coordination rule results for export.
summary: Performs a pairwise bounding-box clash pass across every visible element in Autodesk.Revit.DB.Document.ActiveView, then appends coordination rule results for export.

preprompts: Scanning the current view for clashes…
thinkingsteps: Load tolerance presets and optional tolerance override…
Collect visible elements from the active view…
Run coordination Error Manager rules and merge with geometric clashes…
Persist merged results to QA XML and history…
successprompts: View clash run finished — {total} rows ({geometric} geometric, {rules} from rules).
failureprompts: Clash finder in current view failed: {error}
